title: Downtown Indy Fourth Fest 2026
summary: Indianapolis closes Independence Day with fireworks over White River State Park.
description: Downtown Indy Inc. operates the Fourth Fest celebration with fireworks visible from the central Indianapolis canal walk.
viewingTips: White River State Park lawn has the closest view.
NCAA Hall of Champions plaza and Indianapolis Zoo Plaza are the quieter alternatives.
parkingTips: White River garage and Lucas Oil Stadium West lot have event parking.
West Street closes 6pm to midnight.
transitTips: IndyGo Red Line bus rapid transit runs every 10 minutes through 12:30am.
safetyNotes: Canal walkways narrow and unlit — keep flashlights for the post-show walk.

title: Navy Pier Independence Day Fireworks 2026
summary: Navy Pier launches its summer fireworks series with an extended Independence Day program.
description: Navy Pier operates two summer fireworks evenings per week from May through August, with an extended Independence Day finale.
viewingTips: Pier rotunda gives the closest view but fills by 8pm.
Olive Park (Streeter Drive) is the underrated near-pier alternative.
parkingTips: Navy Pier garage rates jump to $50 on July 4 — Streeter Drive surface lots are cheaper.
Grand Avenue closes east of Stetson at 5pm.
transitTips: CTA bus route 124 runs Navy Pier to Union Station every 7 minutes.
safetyNotes: Lake Michigan winds shift smoke unpredictably — sensitive groups should sit east of the pier.

title: San Antonio Stars and Stripes Over San Antonio 2026
summary: Stars and Stripes Over San Antonio launches fireworks over Woodlawn Lake.
description: San Antonio Parks and Recreation hosts Stars and Stripes Over San Antonio with stage music and a fireworks finale.
viewingTips: Woodlawn Lake Park east shoreline has the closest view.
Olmos Basin Park is the secondary viewing area for overflow crowds.
parkingTips: Free shuttle from Jefferson High School parking lot runs every 15 minutes.
Cincinnati Avenue closes 5pm to midnight.
transitTips: VIA bus 76 reroutes around the lake.
safetyNotes: Mosquito spray is provided at entry stations; lake-edge grass is the highest-density area.

title: Pittsburgh Point State Park Fireworks 2026
summary: Pittsburgh's flagship Independence Day fireworks launch from Point State Park at the rivers' confluence.
description: The City of Pittsburgh operates the EQT Three Rivers fireworks with viewing from both North and South Shore.
viewingTips: Point State Park fountain plaza is the closest official viewing.
North Shore Trail near Acrisure Stadium gives unobstructed cross-river view.
Mount Washington Grandview Overlook is the premium aerial view.
parkingTips: North Shore garages stay open until 1am.
Fort Pitt Boulevard and Commonwealth Place close at 5pm.
transitTips: Port Authority T light rail exits at Gateway Center.
safetyNotes: Mount Washington stairs are uneven — bring flashlights for the descent.

title: Freedom Over Texas Fireworks 2026
summary: Freedom Over Texas is Houston's ticketed Independence Day festival ending with citywide fireworks.
description: The City of Houston operates Freedom Over Texas at Eleanor Tinsley Park; the fireworks finale is visible from Buffalo Bayou greenway and downtown rooftops.
viewingTips: Tinsley Park lawn requires a $10 ticket through Houston Parks online portal.
Sabine Street Bridge is the closest free viewing.
parkingTips: Theater District garages stay open until 1am.
Allen Parkway closes between Shepherd and Bagby at 4pm.
transitTips: METRORail Red Line exits at Theater District.
safetyNotes: Heat advisories often extend through 10pm — water stations at every park entrance.

title: Coney Island Friday Night Fireworks 2026
summary: Coney Island's Friday Night Fireworks series stages an extended program over the holiday weekend.
description: Luna Park and Coney Island USA partner on the Coney Island Friday Night Fireworks series that runs through the summer with an enhanced Independence Day weekend show.
viewingTips: Steeplechase Pier offers a free elevated boardwalk view.
Stillwell Avenue side gives a clear west-coast view.
parkingTips: Surf Avenue lots fill by 4pm; MCU Park lots open after 8pm.
transitTips: D, F, N, Q lines terminate at Stillwell Avenue/Coney Island.
Service runs every 8 minutes through 1:30am.
safetyNotes: Boardwalk benches are unfenced from the beach — keep small children on the inland side.

title: San Jose Discovery Park Fourth of July 2026
summary: San Jose Discovery Park hosts the South Bay's largest free Independence Day fireworks.
description: The City of San Jose operates the Rotary Summer Fest at Discovery Meadow with a fireworks finale.
viewingTips: Discovery Meadow lawn is the primary viewing area.
Diridon Station overhead pedestrian walkway is a quieter alternative.
parkingTips: SAP Center garage and Adobe garage stay open until 1am.
Auzerais Avenue closes east of Bird Avenue at 6pm.
transitTips: VTA Light Rail Green Line exits at San Jose Convention Center.
Caltrain Capitol Corridor weekend schedule applies on July 4.
safetyNotes: Discovery Meadow allows blankets but no high-back chairs after 7pm.

title: Oakland Jack London Square Fireworks 2026
summary: Jack London Square launches Oakland's public Fourth of July fireworks over the estuary.
description: Jack London Square operates Oakland's flagship Independence Day fireworks visible from the entire estuary.
viewingTips: Jack London Square promenade has the closest view.
Alameda Bay Ship Park gives the best Alameda-side perspective.
parkingTips: Jack London garage and Embarcadero lots stay open until 1am.
Embarcadero closes between Webster and Jackson at 5pm.
transitTips: AC Transit O bus runs every 20 minutes from 12th Street BART.
BART San Francisco - Oakland service runs every 15 minutes through 1am.
safetyNotes: Estuary railing heights vary — keep small children inland of the painted line.

title: Buffalo Canalside Fireworks 2026
summary: Canalside Buffalo hosts the city's flagship Independence Day fireworks over Lake Erie.
description: The Erie Canal Harbor Development Corporation operates Canalside's Independence Day fireworks.
viewingTips: Canalside boardwalk has the closest view.
Outer Harbor Wilkeson Pointe is the best alternative.
parkingTips: Canalside lots and the Adams Mark Buffalo garage stay open until 1am.
Main Street closes south of Exchange at 4pm.
transitTips: NFTA Metro Rail extends to 1am on July 4.
safetyNotes: Lake Erie winds shift smoke unpredictably — sensitive groups should sit east of the launch.

title: Salt Lake City Sugar House Park Fireworks 2026
address: 1330 E 2100 S, Salt Lake City, UT 84106
summary: Sugar House Park hosts Salt Lake City's public Independence Day fireworks with valley-wide visibility.
description: Salt Lake City operates the Sugar House Park fireworks with stage programming and family viewing.
viewingTips: Sugar House Park north hill gives a high-ground view above the launch.
Liberty Park is the quieter walk-up alternative.
parkingTips: Highland Drive and 2100 South close to vehicles at 5pm.
TRAX Sugar House Streetcar parking is the best stress-free option.
transitTips: UTA TRAX runs every 15 minutes through 11:30pm.
Sugar House S-Line Streetcar runs every 20 minutes.
safetyNotes: Park stays dry — bring water; high elevation increases dehydration risk.
